nasb.text: If you have sinned, what do you accomplish against Him? And if your transgressions are many, what do you do to Him?

esv.text: If you have sinned, what do you accomplish against him? And if your transgressions are multiplied, what do you do to him?

cnv.text: 你若犯罪，你能使　神受害嗎？ 你的過犯若增多，你又能使他受損嗎？

ccb.text: 你若犯罪，与上帝何妨？ 你若罪恶累累，对祂有何影响？
